title: Advanced Skin Restorer+
description: Fixes some bugged skins for skin overrides! Better skin combo.. Mostly for Cracked users!
body:
✨ Seamless Skin Restoration
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- Persistent Skins: Automatically restores your chosen look, even on offline-mode servers or after a crash.

- Override Bug Fixes: Resolves entity flickering and "invalid state" errors that occur when reloading custom textures.

- Instant Updates: Update your look on the fly using simple commands without needing a game restart.

- Cracked: Its most likely made for cracked users, some people have their skin gone and have normal vanila skins.
===========================================================================
 🚀 Performance & Capability Boosts
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- We’ve pushed the Skin Overrides mod to its limit by bundling a world-class optimization suite. These mods work behind the scenes to ensure your custom layers render smoothly:

- Elite Rendering: ImmediatelyFast and Sodium work together to batch skin draw calls and modernize the rendering pipeline, giving you a massive FPS overhead.

- Advanced Culling: Entity Culling and MoreCulling stop your GPU from wasting power on skins and objects you can't see, significantly boosting performance in crowded lobbies.

- System Efficiency: Lithium and FerriteCore optimize game logic and memory usage, preventing stutters when loading unique player textures.

- Smart Backgrounding: Dynamic FPS reduces resource usage when you're tabbed out, keeping your PC cool while you browse for new skins.
===========================================================================
 📜 Credits
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- Special thanks to the developers of SkinRestorer and the creators of Skin Overrides for their foundational work.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- A huge thank you to the performance improver creators for the incredible optimizing mods that help this pack run smoothly and boost the overall capability of the skin systems.
